src: A mannequin wearing a traditional, red jacket with black lapels and a white high-collared blouse. The voluminous white skirt is adorned with colorful floral embroidery and vibrant fabric flowers at the hem.
edit: A mannequin wearing an ultra-modern dress with a high-tech metallic bodice and sleek lines. The skirt features geometric panels with LED light accents and futuristic textured patterns.

per_image_non_shared_src.0: The object stands slightly angled to the left, one hand on hip, against a lush plant wall with various green and purple foliage covering a dark background.
per_image_non_shared_src.1: The object is facing to the right, hands on hips, with a green backdrop of various plants and ferns filling the space behind it.
per_image_non_shared_src.2: The object is positioned front-facing with hands on hips, surrounded by a dense wall of rich green and purple foliage.
per_image_non_shared_src.3: The object stands slightly turned to the left, hands on hips, against a vibrant wall filled with diverse plants and ferns.
per_image_non_shared_src.4: The object stands slightly facing left, hands on hips, in front of a backdrop filled with dense green vegetation and a mixture of colorful plants.
per_image_non_shared_src.5: The object is seen from the right, hand on hip, amidst a background of lush greenery and various ferns covering the wall.
per_image_non_shared_src.6: The object is turned slightly to the right, with a backdrop of dense green foliage and palm leaves surrounding it on a plant-covered wall.
per_image_non_shared_src.7: The object is positioned at an angle to the right, one hand on hip, against a backdrop of ferns and mixed foliage in varying shades of green.

per_image_non_shared_edit.0: The object stands slightly angled to the left, one hand on hip, on a clear glass podium surrounded by sleek, futuristic panels that reflect light.
per_image_non_shared_edit.1: The object is facing to the right, hands on hips, set against a modern glass podium, with reflections of abstract futuristic patterns.
per_image_non_shared_edit.2: The object is positioned front-facing with hands on hips, standing on a glass podium illuminated with high-tech, futuristic lighting effects.
per_image_non_shared_edit.3: The object stands slightly turned to the left, hands on hips, on a glass podium that features digital patterns and sleek lines.
per_image_non_shared_edit.4: The object stands slightly facing left, hands on hips, on a transparent glass podium with glowing, modern design elements.
per_image_non_shared_edit.5: The object is seen from the right, hand on hip, on a glass podium surrounded by sleek, modern lighting structures.
per_image_non_shared_edit.6: The object is turned slightly to the right, positioned on a glass podium featuring futuristic design details and reflective surfaces.
per_image_non_shared_edit.7: The object is positioned at an angle to the right, one hand on hip, standing on a clear glass podium with curving, ultra-modern architectural lines.
